channel.title: tonya_fl_zx6r TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Enjoy the little things, because one day you’ll look back and realize they were the big things 🫶🏻 - What’s a family ride if I don’t initiate the new riders 😂 Welcome to the fun in bikelife little cousin 🙌🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Enjoy the little things, because one day you’ll look back and realize they were the big things 🫶🏻 - What’s a family ride if I don’t initiate the new riders 😂 Welcome to the fun in bikelife little cousin 🙌🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Let life surprise you with a simple act of saying hello to brighten your day 👋🏻🤍 - Girls are so much friendlier 🥰 She brightened my day saying hello on the highway 🫶🏻 If a guy says hello, I barely look then run away 🤷🏼‍♀️😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motor
item.description: Let life surprise you with a simple act of saying hello to brighten your day 👋🏻🤍 - Girls are so much friendlier 🥰 She brightened my day saying hello on the highway 🫶🏻 If a guy says hello, I barely look then run away 🤷🏼‍♀️😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motor
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: He’s not texting and driving, he’s updating his car insurance in real time 😂🤦🏼‍♀️ - Sorry for yelling and saying a few choice words in your ear over the Cardo Brother 😂 We went around and got off at the next exit - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fy
item.description: He’s not texting and driving, he’s updating his car insurance in real time 😂🤦🏼‍♀️ - Sorry for yelling and saying a few choice words in your ear over the Cardo Brother 😂 We went around and got off at the next exit - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fy
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: WANTED: Gas Daddy, no sugar 😂 Thinking of trading my 122 horsepower for a single horse 🥴 - WTF 😣 I seriously thought about trying to make it to a different gas station where it’s $5 a gallon 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: WANTED: Gas Daddy, no sugar 😂 Thinking of trading my 122 horsepower for a single horse 🥴 - WTF 😣 I seriously thought about trying to make it to a different gas station where it’s $5 a gallon 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: I’m not like a regular mom, I’m a cool mom that rides 😎 But to be honest, I’m just winging it… life, motherhood, my eyeliner, everything 😂 - Taking a 2nd look at a girl when your wife isn’t looking is wild 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: I’m not like a regular mom, I’m a cool mom that rides 😎 But to be honest, I’m just winging it… life, motherhood, my eyeliner, everything 😂 - Taking a 2nd look at a girl when your wife isn’t looking is wild 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: If you don’t swear while driving, then you are not paying attention to the road at all 😂 - His impersonation of road rage took me by surprise 😂💀 I was not expecting that when I pulled up next to him. My kid is turning out to be exactly like me. Well play
item.description: If you don’t swear while driving, then you are not paying attention to the road at all 😂 - His impersonation of road rage took me by surprise 😂💀 I was not expecting that when I pulled up next to him. My kid is turning out to be exactly like me. Well play
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Luck is believing you’re lucky 🍀🤍 - That feeling of watching something bad about to happen and there’s nothing you can do, sucks 😣 Don’t do that again brother 😂🫣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Luck is believing you’re lucky 🍀🤍 - That feeling of watching something bad about to happen and there’s nothing you can do, sucks 😣 Don’t do that again brother 😂🫣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: It is not how much we have, but how much we enjoy, that makes happiness🤍 - I’ve decided to live the rest of my life as if it were Saturday 😂🤭 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: It is not how much we have, but how much we enjoy, that makes happiness🤍 - I’ve decided to live the rest of my life as if it were Saturday 😂🤭 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: I’ve learned that it’s not what I have in my life, but who I have in my life that counts 🥹🤍 - 😂 I thought he was a stalker creeper. He chased me down for a couple miles before I realized it was him 🫠 Don’t be a stranger, you are my family too 🫶🏻 Always -
item.description: I’ve learned that it’s not what I have in my life, but who I have in my life that counts 🥹🤍 - 😂 I thought he was a stalker creeper. He chased me down for a couple miles before I realized it was him 🫠 Don’t be a stranger, you are my family too 🫶🏻 Always -
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: They say, never ride faster than your guardian angel 👼 I say, dress for the slide, not the ride 🫶🏻 - @NBT Clothing Coupon Code: TONYA They now have armored gear designed for women 🙌🏻 Ladies: Get your Armored Hoodie and Armored Leggings - - - #bikergirl
item.description: They say, never ride faster than your guardian angel 👼 I say, dress for the slide, not the ride 🫶🏻 - @NBT Clothing Coupon Code: TONYA They now have armored gear designed for women 🙌🏻 Ladies: Get your Armored Hoodie and Armored Leggings - - - #bikergirl
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Joy is increased by spreading it to others 🫶🏻 And what better way to spread joy than riding all around town handing out Easter Eggs with candy 🥰 - Happy Easter from my family to yours 🐇🤍 @Red Velvet - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Joy is increased by spreading it to others 🫶🏻 And what better way to spread joy than riding all around town handing out Easter Eggs with candy 🥰 - Happy Easter from my family to yours 🐇🤍 @Red Velvet - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Life is like a game, it’s not about winning or losing, it’s about having fun along the way 😁 - I got one small win in the killswitch game 😂 until next time 😏 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Life is like a game, it’s not about winning or losing, it’s about having fun along the way 😁 - I got one small win in the killswitch game 😂 until next time 😏 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Life is a journey, not a race. But if we line up, yes… we are racing 😏😂 - Most bikers do modifications to lighten the weight of their bike, I am the weight reduction at jockey size 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Life is a journey, not a race. But if we line up, yes… we are racing 😏😂 - Most bikers do modifications to lighten the weight of their bike, I am the weight reduction at jockey size 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Try and fail but never fail to try 🤍 - I need to go back to WheelsUpTraining 😅 or lots of bubble wrap for me and my bike 🤣 I don’t like clutch ups, but I can accidentally power up wheelie all the time 🥲 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Try and fail but never fail to try 🤍 - I need to go back to WheelsUpTraining 😅 or lots of bubble wrap for me and my bike 🤣 I don’t like clutch ups, but I can accidentally power up wheelie all the time 🥲 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: No matter what knocks you down in life, get back up and keep going 🫶🏻 - I’ve been there and done that, we all drop our bikes. I’m glad she didn’t get hurt and no scratches on her new bike 🥰 But all of our reactions had me 💀😂 look close at everyone 🤣 @✨Jen
item.description: No matter what knocks you down in life, get back up and keep going 🫶🏻 - I’ve been there and done that, we all drop our bikes. I’m glad she didn’t get hurt and no scratches on her new bike 🥰 But all of our reactions had me 💀😂 look close at everyone 🤣 @✨Jen
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: If you’re in an awkward position, feel comfortable enough to walk away 🤍 or in my case, look away 😂 - He looked at me like I was a masked girl from a dark romance novel 😂😬 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: If you’re in an awkward position, feel comfortable enough to walk away 🤍 or in my case, look away 😂 - He looked at me like I was a masked girl from a dark romance novel 😂😬 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: There are 2 types of people in the world, those that fills up at a quarter tank, and me… who sees how far I can go on E 😂 - My friend is lucky, I almost had to put my bike in the truck of his R8 🤣 or give me a rope, pop it in neutral and pull me like a w
item.description: There are 2 types of people in the world, those that fills up at a quarter tank, and me… who sees how far I can go on E 😂 - My friend is lucky, I almost had to put my bike in the truck of his R8 🤣 or give me a rope, pop it in neutral and pull me like a w
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Trust your instincts, intuition doesn’t lie 🤍🫶🏻 - Thankfully, I started engine braking, otherwise, I would have been even with the red car and hit the guy that pulled out 😅🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Trust your instincts, intuition doesn’t lie 🤍🫶🏻 - Thankfully, I started engine braking, otherwise, I would have been even with the red car and hit the guy that pulled out 😅🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Patience is bitter, but its fruit is sweet 🤍 - I hate arriving first 😂 I have a fear of being stood up or having an awkward conversation with a stranger. Those 10 minutes felt like an hour 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Patience is bitter, but its fruit is sweet 🤍 - I hate arriving first 😂 I have a fear of being stood up or having an awkward conversation with a stranger. Those 10 minutes felt like an hour 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: I smile because you’re my brother 😁 I laugh because there’s nothing you can do about it 😂 - Killswitching my brother is harmless, you should see the family feud when we play Monopoly 🤣 - @Red Velvet - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: I smile because you’re my brother 😁 I laugh because there’s nothing you can do about it 😂 - Killswitching my brother is harmless, you should see the family feud when we play Monopoly 🤣 - @Red Velvet - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Friday is proof that endings can be beautiful beginnings 🫶🏻 - Friday is my 2nd favorite F word 😏 the 1st is Fun, definitely Fun 😁 What F word did you think I was going to say 😜🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Friday is proof that endings can be beautiful beginnings 🫶🏻 - Friday is my 2nd favorite F word 😏 the 1st is Fun, definitely Fun 😁 What F word did you think I was going to say 😜🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: The heat index is somewhere between OMG and WTF 🥵 and it’s only May - My brother secretly wanted to be in the shade too 🤣 It is already way too hot to be sitting in the hot sun, I miss complaining about the cold 🫠 - @Red Velvet - - #bikergirl #biketok #
item.description: The heat index is somewhere between OMG and WTF 🥵 and it’s only May - My brother secretly wanted to be in the shade too 🤣 It is already way too hot to be sitting in the hot sun, I miss complaining about the cold 🫠 - @Red Velvet - - #bikergirl #biketok #
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: No matter what life throws at us, we have the choice of how we react. 🤍 - I used to question that annoying high pitched bike horn, but people hear it 😁 Nice guy even though he continued to back out in the wrong direction 😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motor
item.description: No matter what life throws at us, we have the choice of how we react. 🤍 - I used to question that annoying high pitched bike horn, but people hear it 😁 Nice guy even though he continued to back out in the wrong direction 😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motor
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Remembering you is easy, I do it every day. Missing you is the heartache that never goes away. 🕊️🤍 - One year ago today, you were taken from us too soon, you will always be loved and missed. Until we see each other again 🫶🏻 - To all Bikers: Ride Safe To
item.description: Remembering you is easy, I do it every day. Missing you is the heartache that never goes away. 🕊️🤍 - One year ago today, you were taken from us too soon, you will always be loved and missed. Until we see each other again 🫶🏻 - To all Bikers: Ride Safe To
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Never twist the throttle with your ego 🫶🏻 that’s why my teenage son rides a 125cc 🫠 bigger bike is coming for him soon though… as soon as I see his grades 🤣 - - If parenthood came with a GPS, it would mostly say: Recalculating 😂 I love our mother son bond
item.description: Never twist the throttle with your ego 🫶🏻 that’s why my teenage son rides a 125cc 🫠 bigger bike is coming for him soon though… as soon as I see his grades 🤣 - - If parenthood came with a GPS, it would mostly say: Recalculating 😂 I love our mother son bond
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Life is a game, all you have to do is know how to play it 🤍 - - It’s all fun and games until the cops turn their lights on 😂 I’m just making friends, one cop at a time 😇 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Life is a game, all you have to do is know how to play it 🤍 - - It’s all fun and games until the cops turn their lights on 😂 I’m just making friends, one cop at a time 😇 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: If you’re still looking for that one person to change your life, look in the mirror 🤍 - - I look at fast cars and sport bikes the way that guy looked at my 🍑😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: If you’re still looking for that one person to change your life, look in the mirror 🤍 - - I look at fast cars and sport bikes the way that guy looked at my 🍑😂 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Mistakes are proof that you are trying 🤍 Nice try with the failed killswitch attempt 😂 - I thought he was going to turn my key off 😂 my look of WTH is he trying to do until he said “wrong side”, he tried to killswitch me, but that button is on the right 🤣
item.description: Mistakes are proof that you are trying 🤍 Nice try with the failed killswitch attempt 😂 - I thought he was going to turn my key off 😂 my look of WTH is he trying to do until he said “wrong side”, he tried to killswitch me, but that button is on the right 🤣
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: When you find Neutral and play it off like you meant to Rev it 😂 @Red Velvet - Life is a bumpy ride. The trick is to relax, absorb the bumps and learn to enjoy it 🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: When you find Neutral and play it off like you meant to Rev it 😂 @Red Velvet - Life is a bumpy ride. The trick is to relax, absorb the bumps and learn to enjoy it 🫶🏻 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: The only thing better than a long weekend, is it’s followed by a short work week 😅 TGIF 🙌🏻 - Wishing you a fun and fabulous weekend! 🤍 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: The only thing better than a long weekend, is it’s followed by a short work week 😅 TGIF 🙌🏻 - Wishing you a fun and fabulous weekend! 🤍 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: I may not be perfect, but when I look at my son I know I got something perfectly right 🥹🤍 . . #ninjazx6r #zx6r #ninja #kawigang #kawasaki #kawasakininja636 #motogirl #motorcycles #moto #bikelife #motorcyclelife #ladyrider #reels #florida #bikeswithoutli
item.description: I may not be perfect, but when I look at my son I know I got something perfectly right 🥹🤍 . . #ninjazx6r #zx6r #ninja #kawigang #kawasaki #kawasakininja636 #motogirl #motorcycles #moto #bikelife #motorcyclelife #ladyrider #reels #florida #bikeswithoutli
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Mothers are nature’s ultimate mama bear 🐻 They stick up for their child no matter the danger 🫶🏻 - Grateful he was able to avoid the truck 🫶🏻 but I really need to start carrying pennies in my pocket 😠 - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #family
item.description: Mothers are nature’s ultimate mama bear 🐻 They stick up for their child no matter the danger 🫶🏻 - Grateful he was able to avoid the truck 🫶🏻 but I really need to start carrying pennies in my pocket 😠 - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #family
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r

item.title: Making one person smile can change the world, maybe not the whole world, but their world 🤍😁 - Always supporting our local 🚔😊 Maybe 🤔 making 🚔 friends will get me out of a ticket 😂 jk, I think 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.description: Making one person smile can change the world, maybe not the whole world, but their world 🤍😁 - Always supporting our local 🚔😊 Maybe 🤔 making 🚔 friends will get me out of a ticket 😂 jk, I think 🤣 - - - #bikergirl #biketok #motorcycle #fyp #fun
item.author: tonya_fl_zx6r
